Localization.Description: Suspicious connection to Wi-Fi equipment. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from a device with new MAC address {src.mac} connected to Wi-Fi equipment on host {event_src.host}. The MAC address is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} connected to Wi-Fi equipment {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to Wi-Fi equipment on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
